sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) AS male_percentage FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.district_id = (SELECT T3.district_id FROM district AS T3 WHERE T3."A3" = 'south Bohemia' ORDER BY CAST(T3."A4" AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1);

raw_response.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) AS male_percentage FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.district_id = (SELECT T3.district_id FROM district AS T3 WHERE T3."A3" = 'south Bohemia' ORDER BY CAST(T3."A4" AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1);
raw_response.notes: Repaired to select the largest-inhabitant south Bohemia branch by district_id before computing the male-client percentage.
